data.content: Fixed ReTakes blank/empty behavior when beat fetches fail: retakes-view now throws on failed active/single-repo loads, falls back to registered repos when active repo fetch fails, and only shows empty state when fetches genuinely succeed with zero retake candidates. Added regression contract test src/lib/__tests__/retakes-fetch-failure-contract.test.ts. Gates: bun run lint (warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test (1899 passed), NODE_ENV=production bun run build (pass).
